phase: Phase 4A - Local Demo / Staging Environment Stabilization
authority: Ticket pack governs Phase 4A execution only after approval. Repo source of truth remains Prisma, contracts, manifests, generated registry, ADRs, tests, validation evidence, and closure packages.
global_invariants: Phase 4A is local/demo environment stabilization only, not production launch.
Use committed Prisma migrations and prisma migrate deploy for proof; db push is not valid final proof.
Real .env files, local secret files, production credential files, and production secrets are forbidden.
.env.local.example and .env.demo.example may be created only as non-secret templates.
Hybrid local mode may be first, but full Docker Compose API/Web/Postgres must be resolved as required, approval-gated, or explicitly deferred with evidence.

No Phase 4B frontend redesign, Phase 5 work, Foundry/module installer implementation, platform AI runtime, new modules, real WhatsApp production behavior, or production cloud/VPS deployment is authorized.

tickets.title: Baseline local run inventory
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert the ticket control report and ticket artifacts, then return to the prior approved Phase 4A control state without changing runtime source, schema, packages, deployment files, or secrets.
tickets.objective: Record the current post-Phase-4 local run reality before any Phase 4A implementation.
scope: Confirm current branch and HEAD.
Inventory package scripts, API/web commands, env vars, ports, routes, Docker absence/presence, Phase 4 proof inputs, and frontend evidence inputs.
Record that Phase 4A starts from post-Phase-4 source refresh state.
non_scope: No ticket execution beyond baseline evidence.
validation_commands: rg -n "packageManager|start|start:dev|dev|build|DATABASE_URL|AKTI_|NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL" package.json apps/api/package.json apps/web/package.json .env.example apps/api/src apps/web/app
acceptance_criteria: Current run commands, env vars, ports, and frontend evidence inputs are recorded.
No implementation files changed.
No Phase 4B or Phase 5 scope introduced.
stop_conditions: Repo state is dirty or branch is unclear.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: If this inventory is skipped, later local scripts may encode stale ports, env names, or proof assumptions.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: repo state -> script/env inventory -> Phase 4A decisions -> implementation tickets
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A baseline report with exact commands, env vars, ports, and evidence inputs.
tickets.split_if: Split only if repository state differs from post-Phase-4 main or Phase 4 evidence is missing.
requires_human_approval_if: Baseline shows required package/dependency changes.
Baseline shows missing Phase 4 proof documents.

tickets.title: Node/pnpm/Corepack runtime decision
tickets.commit_message: P4A-001 decide Node pnpm Corepack runtime
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert the ticket decision record and ticket artifacts, then return to the prior approved Phase 4A control state without changing runtime source, schema, packages, deployment files, or secrets.
tickets.objective: Define the supported local Node/pnpm runtime posture for Phase 4A.
scope: Inspect packageManager, lockfile engine requirements, current local versions, and Corepack availability.
Document Node 22 LTS as default recommendation unless repo evidence proves otherwise.
Require Corepack-managed pnpm 10.12.1.
non_scope: No package.json engines addition unless separately approved.
decision_options: Node 22 LTS with Corepack and pnpm@10.12.1
stop for approval if package metadata must change
acceptance_criteria: Recommended local runtime is documented.
Corepack and pnpm posture is documented.
No package or lockfile drift occurs.
stop_conditions: Node version requirements conflict with repository dependencies.
A package or lockfile change appears required.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Without a pinned local runtime posture, local demo scripts may fail across machines.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: packageManager -> Corepack -> pnpm version -> install/build/smoke scripts
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: Decision record naming recommended Node LTS and pnpm/Corepack usage.
tickets.split_if: Split if package engine changes become necessary.
requires_human_approval_if: Adding engines to package.json is proposed.
Lockfile or package changes are proposed.

tickets.title: Local environment architecture decision
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert the ticket decision record and ticket artifacts, then return to the prior approved Phase 4A control state without changing runtime source, schema, packages, deployment files, or secrets.
tickets.objective: Choose the initial Phase 4A local runtime architecture.
scope: Compare hybrid local mode, full Docker Compose mode, and both-mode strategy.
Select hybrid local as first proof path unless evidence requires another path.
Define local ports and service responsibilities.
acceptance_criteria: Initial runtime architecture is selected.
Ports and service boundaries are documented.
Full Compose remains unresolved until P4A-003/P4A-011.
stop_conditions: No safe local architecture can be selected without dependency changes.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: If architecture is vague, later scripts may mix dev/proof/prod assumptions.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: Phase 4 proof evidence -> architecture decision -> env templates -> startup scripts -> smoke/browser proof
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A selected initial architecture and port map.
tickets.split_if: Split if hybrid and full Compose both require immediate implementation planning.
requires_human_approval_if: Cloud/VPS resources are proposed.
New dependencies are proposed.

tickets.title: Full Docker Compose API/Web/Postgres decision gate
tickets.commit_message: P4A-003 decide full Docker Compose posture
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert the ticket decision record and ticket artifacts, then return to the prior approved Phase 4A control state without changing runtime source, schema, packages, deployment files, or secrets.
tickets.objective: Prevent hybrid local mode from silently becoming the final ambition.
scope: Decide whether full Docker Compose API/Web/Postgres mode is required, approval-gated, or explicitly deferred with evidence.
Define what evidence P4A-011 must produce based on the selected mode.
non_scope: No Dockerfiles or Compose implementation in this ticket.
selection_criteria: whether hybrid proof is enough for Phase 4A closure
acceptance_criteria: Full Compose is classified as required, approval-gated, or explicitly deferred with evidence.
P4A-011 obligations are clear.
No implementation files are created.
stop_conditions: Decision would require dependency changes without approval.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Without this gate, Phase 4A may stop at hybrid scripts and fail the noob-proof local demo ambition.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: full Compose decision -> P4A-011 resolution -> runbook/closure evidence
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A decision record with selected full Compose posture.
tickets.split_if: Split if full Compose is required immediately and needs its own implementation ticket pack.
requires_human_approval_if: Full Compose implementation needs package or dependency changes.
Containerized API/web requires new build assumptions.

tickets.title: Env template and no-secret policy
tickets.commit_message: P4A-004 define env templates and no-secret policy
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the files created or modified by this ticket, preserve prior ticket artifacts, and do not roll back migrations, Prisma schema, package files, or dependency state as a repair shortcut.
tickets.objective: Create non-secret local/demo env templates and no-secret rules if approved by exact-file plan.
scope: Define `.env.local.example` and/or `.env.demo.example` values.
Document no-secret validation and redaction expectations.
Ensure templates map to runtime env parsing.
non_scope: No runtime env behavior changes unless separately approved.
decision_options: decision-only if template changes need approval
acceptance_criteria: Templates contain placeholders only.
Every template variable has a runtime use or documented purpose.
Real env files remain untracked.
stop_conditions: A runtime env variable must change without approval.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Env templates drift quickly if not tied to runtime parsing.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: env template -> runtime parser -> API/web startup -> smoke/browser proof
tickets.split_if: Split if runtime code changes are required to support local env.
requires_human_approval_if: Runtime env parser changes are needed.
Package scripts are needed to load env files.

tickets.title: Local DB reset and migration proof design
tickets.commit_message: P4A-005 define local DB reset migration proof
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert the ticket decision record and ticket artifacts, then return to the prior approved Phase 4A control state without changing runtime source, schema, packages, deployment files, or secrets.
tickets.objective: Define safe local/demo database reset and migration proof behavior.
scope: Define local database names, volume/reset strategy, and safety checks.
Require committed migrations and prisma migrate deploy.
Forbid db push as final proof.
non_scope: No Prisma schema or migration changes.
decision_options: named demo DB reset with safety guard
stop if clean migration proof cannot use committed migrations
acceptance_criteria: Reset safety rules are explicit.
`prisma migrate deploy` is mandatory.
`db push` is explicitly rejected as final proof.
stop_conditions: Clean DB proof requires Prisma schema/migration changes.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Without a reset contract, local-reset scripts can become destructive or bypass migrations.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: local DB -> reset safety -> migrate deploy -> setup org -> smoke proof
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A DB reset/migration contract with safety predicates.
tickets.split_if: Split if migration repair is required.
requires_human_approval_if: Prisma schema or migration changes are needed.
Any non-disposable DB would be touched.

tickets.title: Hybrid local runtime implementation proof
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the files created or modified by this ticket, preserve prior ticket artifacts, and do not roll back migrations, Prisma schema, package files, or dependency state as a repair shortcut.
tickets.objective: Prove the initial hybrid local runtime path with local/demo Postgres plus host API/web.
scope: Create approved local/demo runtime files after exact-file plan.
Run local/demo Postgres, API, and web.
Apply migrations with prisma migrate deploy.
Prove health/setup/web availability.
non_scope: No full Compose API/web unless P4A-003 requires it.
validation_commands: pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma --config prisma.config.ts
pnpm exec prisma migrate diff --from-config-datasource --to-schema prisma/schema.prisma --script --exit-code --config prisma.config.ts
acceptance_criteria: Hybrid local runtime starts and stops cleanly.
Clean DB migrates through committed migrations.
API and web are reachable through documented URLs.
No runtime source, Prisma, package, or dependency drift.
stop_conditions: db push appears as final proof.
Production or persistent DB is implicated.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Implementation must re-plan after environment and DB decisions or scripts will encode stale assumptions.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: Docker/local DB -> env templates -> API/web processes -> health/setup/web proof
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A working hybrid local runtime proof with logs.
tickets.split_if: Split if API, web, and DB startup need separate implementation commits.
requires_human_approval_if: Runtime source changes are required.
Package/dependency changes are required.
Full Compose API/web must be implemented immediately.

tickets.title: Local up/down/reset scripts
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the files created or modified by this ticket, preserve prior ticket artifacts, and do not roll back migrations, Prisma schema, package files, or dependency state as a repair shortcut.
tickets.objective: Create noob-proof local lifecycle commands for startup, shutdown, and reset.
scope: Create local-up, local-down, and local-reset scripts.
Ensure reset targets only approved local/demo resources.
Print clear browser URL and failure messages.
non_scope: No package script wiring unless separately approved.
acceptance_criteria: Startup, shutdown, and reset commands are documented and work.
Reset is scoped to local/demo resources only.
Failure messages identify likely missing Docker, port, env, or migration issue.
stop_conditions: Scripts require dependency changes without approval.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Scripts become dangerous if reset names and ports are not tied to P4A-005/P4A-006.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: Working lifecycle scripts with clear operator output.
tickets.split_if: Split if startup and reset safety require separate review.
requires_human_approval_if: Package scripts must be changed.
Docker behavior requires privileged operations.

tickets.title: Local smoke script
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the files created or modified by this ticket, preserve prior ticket artifacts, and do not roll back migrations, Prisma schema, package files, or dependency state as a repair shortcut.
tickets.objective: Create one-command local smoke validation for the demo runtime.
scope: Check API health, web availability, setup organization, CORS/security basics, and key Phase 3/4 protections where feasible.
Produce clear pass/fail output.
tests_required: Run local smoke against active local demo runtime
acceptance_criteria: One-command smoke passes against local demo runtime.
Failures are classified with clear remediation hints.
No secrets appear in output.
stop_conditions: Smoke cannot run against local/demo only.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Smoke coverage must follow actual local runtime URLs and env outputs.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A smoke script that verifies local API/web/setup health.
tickets.split_if: Split if authenticated Lead Desk smoke needs separate fixture generation.
requires_human_approval_if: Adding browser/e2e dependencies is proposed.
Runtime source must change to expose health.

tickets.title: Browser inspection and screenshot capture support
tickets.commit_message: P4A-009 add browser inspection screenshot support
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the files created or modified by this ticket, preserve prior ticket artifacts, and do not roll back migrations, Prisma schema, package files, or dependency state as a repair shortcut.
tickets.objective: Create repeatable browser inspection and screenshot evidence support without frontend redesign.
scope: Document/open clear browser URL.
Capture screenshots for current route inventory.
Redact logs and screenshots.
Use current frontend evidence as input.
required_outputs: local-capture-frontend.sh or documented no-new-dependency capture procedure
acceptance_criteria: Current frontend can be opened at a documented local URL.
Screenshot capture path is repeatable.
No real token/session/secret values are captured.
Frontend redesign is not performed.
stop_conditions: Browser automation requires a new dependency without approval.
Screenshots/logs expose real secrets or tokens.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Browser evidence becomes stale if routes and ports are not tied to local-up output.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: local URL -> browser route inventory -> screenshots -> redaction review
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A repeatable screenshot capture path or documented no-new-dependency browser procedure.
tickets.split_if: Split if automated screenshot capture and manual Codex browser capture require different controls.
requires_human_approval_if: New browser tooling dependency is needed.
Frontend route changes are needed.

tickets.title: Full Docker Compose resolution
tickets.commit_message: P4A-011 resolve full Docker Compose posture
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the files created or modified by this ticket, preserve prior ticket artifacts, and do not roll back migrations, Prisma schema, package files, or dependency state as a repair shortcut.
tickets.objective: Resolve full Docker Compose API/Web/Postgres mode as required, approval-gated, or deferred with evidence.
scope: Use P4A-003 decision output.
If required and approved, prove full Compose mode.
If approval-gated, stop with explicit approval request.
If deferred, document evidence and deferral.
selection_criteria: no unapproved package or dependency changes
tests_required: Based on selected mode: full Compose smoke or deferral evidence review
acceptance_criteria: Full Compose posture is resolved.
No silent hybrid-only final state.
Approved implementation or explicit evidence-backed deferral exists.
stop_conditions: Full Compose requires unapproved package/dependency/runtime changes.
Docker is unavailable and no approved deferral exists.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: This ticket prevents full Compose ambition from being lost after hybrid success.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: P4A-003 decision -> P4A-011 resolution -> runbook -> closure evidence
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A clear full Compose resolution with proof or explicit deferral.
tickets.split_if: Split into separate implementation ticket if full Compose is approved and requires Dockerfiles.
requires_human_approval_if: Full Compose API/web implementation requires package or lockfile changes.
Dockerfiles require runtime source assumptions not already proven.

tickets.title: Local demo runbook
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the files created or modified by this ticket, preserve prior ticket artifacts, and do not roll back migrations, Prisma schema, package files, or dependency state as a repair shortcut.
tickets.objective: Create the human/Codex runbook for local demo use.
scope: Document startup, shutdown, reset, smoke, browser inspection, screenshots, and troubleshooting.
Include no-secret and no-production warnings.
Reference full Compose decision state.
non_scope: No Phase 4B UI guidance beyond run/inspect handoff.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook matches implemented local scripts and URLs.
Runbook warns against production secrets/resources.
Runbook includes failure messages/troubleshooting.
stop_conditions: Runbook describes commands that do not exist.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Runbook must be generated after scripts/evidence exist, not before.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: local scripts -> runbook commands -> smoke/browser evidence -> closure package
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: A runbook a non-expert can follow for local demo startup/shutdown/reset/smoke.
tickets.split_if: Split if runbook must separately cover hybrid and full Compose modes.
requires_human_approval_if: Runbook would document production or cloud resource use.

tickets.title: Validation alignment and no-secret evidence
tickets.commit_message: P4A-012 align validation and no-secret evidence
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the files created or modified by this ticket, preserve prior ticket artifacts, and do not roll back migrations, Prisma schema, package files, or dependency state as a repair shortcut.
tickets.objective: Align final Phase 4A validation and redaction evidence before closure.
scope: Run full applicable validation ladder.
Confirm no Prisma/schema/registry/package drift unless explicitly approved.
Run no-secret scans over logs, templates, screenshots, and artifacts.
non_scope: No repair beyond active Phase 4A scope.
acceptance_criteria: Full validation passes.
No unapproved drift exists.
No real secret/token/credential is present in artifacts.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Closure without final validation can hide local-demo drift.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: implemented local demo -> validation ladder -> no-secret evidence -> P4A-GATE
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: Passing final validation and no-secret summary.
tickets.split_if: Split if validation failures require implementation repairs.
requires_human_approval_if: Any repair touches runtime source, Prisma, contracts, packages, or dependencies.

tickets.title: Phase 4A closure audit and final external audit package
tickets.commit_message: P4A-GATE complete Phase 4A closure audit package
tickets.rollback_notes: Remove or regenerate the closure package from the last valid committed Phase 4A HEAD; do not alter source files to repair packaging.
tickets.objective: Close Phase 4A with audit report, evidence package, and Phase 4B readiness handoff only.
scope: Complete Phase 4A audit report with execution evidence.
Create final external audit package from committed HEAD.
Create Phase 4B readiness handoff.
Classify accepted deferrals.
files_forbidden_to_change: apps/** runtime source unless already approved in prior ticket
acceptance_criteria: Audit report is completed with evidence only.
Final package is generated from committed HEAD.
Checksums and exclusions verify.
Phase 4B readiness handoff is created without starting Phase 4B.
stop_conditions: Audit package cannot be generated from committed HEAD.
Phase 4B or Phase 5 scope is introduced.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Closure evidence must reflect committed HEAD and not untracked runtime artifacts.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: all ticket evidence -> final validation -> committed HEAD -> external audit package -> Phase 4B handoff
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: Final audit package from committed HEAD with passing validation and checksums.
tickets.split_if: Split if final validation discovers implementation defects requiring repair.
requires_human_approval_if: Closure would require Phase 4B or Phase 5 planning.
Final package must include non-source artifacts with sensitive data.
